A test script that verifies division of a Number object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the division operation in JavaScript. It creates a `Number` object with the value `6` and divides it by `3`, then asserts that the result is equal to `2`. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a test suite to verify the correctness of basic arithmetic operations in a JavaScript environment. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the behavior of the division operation with a `Number` object.
